name: From Overload to Insights: How AI Agents Can Support Scientists in Analyzing Complex Data
summary: arXiv:2607.16845v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scientists at European XFEL conduct experiments that generate very large and complex datasets. The subsequent data analysis is challenging as scienti...
description: arXiv:2607.16845v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scientists at European XFEL conduct experiments that generate very large and complex datasets. The subsequent data analysis is challenging as scientists must combine their domain expertise with facility- and software-specific knowledge scattered across documentation, tools, and support channels. To address this problem, we designed and evaluated a...
author: Tim Fuchs, Luca Gelisio, Steffen Hauf, Walid Maalej
